calendar.matters:
Petition For Approval Of Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Jun-10-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Freedman for Susan Lee. Edward Koplowitz for Tony Lee.

Mr. Koplowitz stated that Susan Lee is the Successor Trustee of the Family Trust, that she filed the petition and is settling the matter in that capacity, and that the sale proceeds will be an asset of the Trust. Mr. Koplowitz also stated that all of the Beneficiaries participated in the settlement and that they all received notice. Mr. Freedman stated that the purpose of the settlement was to avoid litigation. The Petition for Approval of Settlement Agreement and the Petition to Set Aside and Cancel the Grant Deed were taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

1. To Set Aside And Cancel The Grant Deed Transferring Trust Property (Prob. Code Section 850 (A)(3)(B); 2. Financial Elder Abuse; 3. For Fraud; 4. Fo
Off Calendar Jun-10-2014 Granted Per Written Order

1. To Set Aside And Cancel The Grant Deed Transferring Trust Property (Prob. Code Section 850 (A)(3)(B); 2. Financial Elder Abuse; 3. For Fraud; 4. Fo
Off Calendar May-12-2014 Continued To Jun-04-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

1. To Set Aside And Cancel The Grant Deed Transferring Trust Property (Prob. Code Section 850 (A)(3)(B); 2. Financial Elder Abuse; 3. For Fraud; 4. Fo
Off Calendar Jan-13-2014 Continued To May-12-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Freedman for Susan Lee. Edward Koplowitz for and with Tony Lee.

Mr. Koplowitz stated that they have spoken and that they agree to go to Pro Bono Mediation. Mr. Freedman stated that he wants to do some discovery. The Court suggested that the Parties agree to exchange documents in the form of informal discovery. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than May 5, 2014. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by May 5, 2014. The Petition to Set Aside and Cancel the Grant Deed Transferring Trust Property, etc. was continued to and the Parties are to return on May 12, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)
